candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line and more specific/preferred than the subtotal 'Total Revenue'.
Valid revenue subtotal, but less preferred than the direct 'Revenue' line.
Revenue component rather than total top-line; not appropriate as primary REVT when total revenue lines exist.

variables.notes: Use 'Revenue' first, with 'Total Revenue' as fallback if labels change across years.

candidates.why: Best match for cost of sales / direct operating costs; appears to aggregate direct materials/services.
Looks like a component/sub-line of direct costs rather than the full COGS line.

variables.notes: Selected the broader direct-cost line rather than a component.

candidates.why: Candidate exists, but likely part of direct cost structure because it sits under/near 'Raw materials and services'; less suitable as SG&A.
Clear operating overhead bucket and appropriate SG&A component.
Overhead-type row, but sparse and likely partial/subcomponent versus broader staff expense line.

variables.notes: Candidate list appears to miss the strongest personnel-overhead row: 'Staf expenses' (exact spelling in column A). I excluded 'External Services' because it likely belongs to direct costs/COGS given the nearby 'Raw materials and services' aggregation. I included 'Other operating expenses' plus 'Staf expenses' as the best SG&A coverage. Manual review recommended because one chosen label is outside the candidate list and the staff-cost classification could vary by issuer. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Staf expenses
No dedicated research/development row is present on the Income Statement.

candidates.why: Broad finance expense line available in all shown years; good fallback when explicit interest expense is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Too narrow; lease-interest component only, not total interest expense.
Best semantic match for XINT where available.
Residual finance cost component, not preferred over explicit interest expense.
Net finance result includes income offsets; only use after pure expense lines.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure and too narrow for total interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority order uses explicit interest expense first, then broader finance expense, then net finance expense as last fallback.

candidates.why: Asset line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity belonging to the owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match because it represents parent/owner equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Valid total equity line but would include non-controlling interests and risk double counting with MIB.
Balancing row, not appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet equation, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity belonging to the owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity excludes non-controlling interests, consistent with separate MIB mapping.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not preferred when balance sheet NCI exists.
Best balance sheet match for minority/non-controlling interests.
Also valid, but appears duplicative of 'Non-controlling interests'; prefer the modern label.
Income statement allocation line, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet non-controlling interest line; avoided duplicate synonym 'Minority Interest'.
